title: pinalia pulvinata
intro: Pinalia pulvinata, also known as the "Green Dendrobium," is a type of flowering orchid native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pinalia pulvinata include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are typically used to make teas, infusions, or tonics, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
